description_long: This airplane features a sleek, angular fuselage with a predominantly light gray body accented by bold orange stripes and details. It has a distinctive trijet engine configuration at the rear, with three large, circular exhausts visible, suggesting high thrust capability. The wings are sharply swept back and integrated into the body, with additional cylindrical components mounted above the main wing surfaces. The cockpit is positioned forward and is enclosed with a dark, streamlined canopy, providing clear visibility for the pilot. The tail section is equipped with a prominent vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers, forming a conventional tail design. The overall appearance is futuristic and aerodynamic, with smooth, hard surfaces and minimal external protrusions.
description: A futuristic, angular airplane with a trijet rear engine setup, swept-back wings, and bold orange accents on a light gray body. The forward cockpit and conventional tail design enhance its aerodynamic, high-performance look.
description_view_0: Rear view showing three large circular engine exhausts and the angular tail section with orange accents.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the swept-back wings, cylindrical components above the wings, and the forward cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the pointed nose, forward cockpit, and symmetrical wing layout with visible orange striping.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the engine nacelles, wing integration, and tail structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and integrated cylindrical components; no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Triple rear-mounted jet engines with circular exhausts.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Not visibly extended; likely retractable landing gear based on design, but not confirmed in images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a streamlined dark canopy.
